candidate_summary: KAVA-CIRCLE-FB: tier-graded message weighting + tier-graded ack-count + clockwise tier-rotation message-pass for hierarchical multi-agent LLM systems (Tongan Taumafa Kava ceremony inspiration).

results_analysis.title: Talk Structurally Act Hierarchically TalkHier (2025/02)
results_analysis.reason: Hierarchical multi-agent LLM with structured communication protocol + coordinated feedback — direct functional twin to tier-graded message weighting + hierarchical refinement. Triple-threshold hit.

results_analysis.title: Which LLM Multi-Agent Protocol to Choose (2025/10)
results_analysis.reason: Catalog of LLM multi-agent protocols including hierarchical topologies with tier-graded routing — covers the protocol design space of KAVA-CIRCLE-FB. Triple-threshold hit.

results_analysis.title: RL for LLM Multi-Agent through Orchestration Traces (2026/05)
results_analysis.reason: Orchestrator-traced credit assignment at agent-/role-/turn-level is functionally equivalent to tier-graded message weighting. Triple-threshold hit.

results_analysis.title: Provable Coordination for LLM Agents via Message Sequence Charts (2026/04)
results_analysis.reason: MSC coordination DSL separates message-passing structure from LLM actions — covers rotation/ack message protocol component. Triple-threshold hit.

results_analysis.title: Multi-Agent Collaboration Mechanisms Survey (2025/01)
results_analysis.reason: Inverse-entropy fusion dynamically weights messages by agent confidence — functional equivalent of tier-weighted feedback attenuation. Triple-threshold hit.

results_analysis.title: L2M2 Hierarchical Framework LLM (IJCAI 2025)
results_analysis.reason: Hierarchical LLM+RL integration covers tier-graded structure. Triple-threshold hit (kw, sem, func all >= threshold).

results_analysis.title: MegaAgent Large-Scale Autonomous Multi-Agent (ACL Findings 2025)
results_analysis.reason: Large-scale hierarchical multi-agent with explicit tier-based scaling directly matches KAVA-CIRCLE-FB tier design. Triple-threshold hit.

results_analysis.title: Multi-Agent Collaboration via Evolving Orchestration (R405 reference)
results_analysis.reason: RL-orchestrator with adaptive prioritization — directly named as R405 reference and explicitly cited in candidate as prior art. Triple-threshold hit.

verdict_sentence: KAVA-CIRCLE-FB FAILS verification with 8/8 results crossing all three thresholds (kw>=2, sem>=0.7, func>=0.7); TalkHier, the multi-agent protocol catalog, orchestration-trace credit assignment, MSC coordination, inverse-entropy fusion survey, L2M2, MegaAgent, and Evolving Orchestration collectively cover tier-graded message weighting, hierarchical communication protocols, and adaptive routing — recombination is not sufficient novelty.
